## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off strategy sprint for Airbyte's content and marketing initiatives leveraging AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airbyte is targeting larger enterprises and traditional industries for infrastructure modernization, with a focus on on-premise/hybrid deployments and data sovereignty](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Current content strategy has laid groundwork with 10k+ pages, but needs optimization for freshness and quality](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [AI workflows offer potential to scale personalized content creation, analyze customer data, and automate marketing/sales processes](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Airbyte's Market Position and Target Customers

  - [Moving upmarket to target larger enterprises and traditional industries (healthcare, financial services)](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Key value propositions:](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [Infrastructure modernization (e.g. replacing legacy ETL tools)](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [On-premise/hybrid deployments for data sovereignty requirements](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
      - [Cost savings (e.g. C-Man saving $700k/year switching from Azure Data Factory)](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
      - [Enabling AI/ML workflows by consolidating data sources](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Current Content Strategy and Performance

  - [Created 10k+ pages in last 1.5 years](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [Some pages performing well, others need optimization](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [Need to refresh content every 60-90 days to keep up with AI platform changes](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [Successful content types:](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
      - [Data glossary](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)
      - [Competitor comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=2123.0)
      - [Tutorials and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=2137.0)
      - ["Top X tools" listicles](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=2153.0)

### AI Workflow Capabilities

  - [Fact-checking and content verification](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=2547.0)
  - [Metadata generation from GitHub repos](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=2632.0)
  - [User session analysis for product insights](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=2811.0)
  - [Image generation and asset creation](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)
  - [Potential for automating white paper creation and sales enablement content](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=3196.0)

### Marketing and Sales Funnel

  - [70% of enterprise deals start with product trials](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Outbound: 70% phone, 20% LinkedIn, 10% email](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Email effective as marketing touchpoint to increase phone call success](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Need for more personalized content and lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=3196.0)

### Technical Infrastructure

  - [Using Superbase (Postgres database) for managing large volumes of content](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=3378.0)
  - [Challenges with traditional CMS for high-volume content updates](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=3407.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Regroup internally to synthesize insights and shape strategy lanes](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=3504.0)
  - [Explore two main tracks:](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=3504.0)
    1.  Optimize existing programmatic content creation
    2.  Develop workflows to process sales calls/data for personalization
  - [Investigate potential for generating white papers and sales enablement content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=3196.0)
  - [Determine best approach for CMS integration or database management for high-volume content](https://fathom.video/share/fe9sz8LKX_fbHDXHQRyVFc22gU34nFWo?tab=summary&timestamp=3407.0)
